author: lOrm
content: Refactored execute_notebook_edit (V(G) >= 18, 200+ LOC) into 9 single-responsibility helpers: parse_args, preflight_and_open, read_and_parse, resolve_locator, apply_replace, apply_insert, apply_delete, dispatch_edit, write_notebook, format_success. Entry point: 32 LOC (bound: 80). Pipeline linear: validate -> preflight -> read -> resolve -> dispatch -> persist -> summarize. #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] REMOVED. No clippy.toml, no #[ignore]. cargo clippy --lib --all-targets exit 0. cargo test --lib: 1412 passed, 0 failed (16 notebook tests unmodified).
